title: Prompt & workflow refinement — governing option space
question: What are the available options for refining the plan-generation prompts and workflow, given the research + heuristics, and how do they GOVERN the specifics?
method: synthesis of R-0002..R-0010 + R-0009 heuristics + R-0007/R-0008 authoritative + DEC-48; structured into governing build-tracks. Full body: the findings_document.
findings_summary: Governing option space (the prompt/workflow specifics conform to it): PROMPT-level (FEAT-005) = bake the heuristics + authoritative structure into generation (distributed ownership; in+out-of-class incl. SAO/HRT/YGL/Dorm; bilingual dual-purpose; HOW+frequency; diverse focus; measurement-tools-key; ACS-WASC per-Goal header + 6-col labels; no cert-risk meta + standards-key+name + Theme=title; verbatim labels; grounding-leanness). WORKFLOW-level (FEAT-006) = a post-generation transform/distiller (target-band distillation; coverage floors; grounded extrapolation; re-validation harness; distance-to-band scorer; iterate-to-band w/ separate judge; optional per-step decomposition). Three mechanism axes (generation-bias vs post-gen transform vs view-layer; LLM vs deterministic vs hybrid; one vs tiered artifacts). Recommended composition: generate-standard -> deterministic derivation -> freeze-list+budget -> LLM prose-distill -> re-validate+coverage-floors -> iterate-to-band w/ separate judge -> tier. Governed by DEC-49; carried as FEAT-005/FEAT-006 acceptance criteria.
